member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure SQL database. This is a child resource of an .
member.param: The name of the resource.
The database name.
The Azure SQL Database (server) parent resource associated with this database.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource)
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure SQL database. This is a child resource of an .
member.param: The name of the resource.
The database name.
The Azure SQL Database (server) parent resource associated with this database.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.FREE_DB_SKU
member.summary: SKU associated with the free offer

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.Parent
member.summary: Gets the parent Azure SQL Database (server) resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Azure SQL database.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.DatabaseName
member.summary: Gets the database name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.UseDefaultAzureSku
member.summary: Gets or Sets the database SKU name

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.InnerResource
member.summary:
Gets the inner SqlServerDatabaseResource resource.
This is set when RunAsContainer is called on the AzureSqlServerResource resource to create a local SQL Server container.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.IsContainer
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current resource represents a container. If so the actual resource is not running in Azure.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the Azure SQL database.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource.JdbcConnectionString
member.summary: Gets the JDBC connection string for the Azure SQL database.
member.remarks: Format: jdbc:sqlserver://{host}:{port};database={database};encrypt=true;trustServerCertificate=false. When running in a container, inherits the container JDBC format including username and password.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Sql Server resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.#ctor(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.SqlServerServerResource,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The that this resource wraps.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.FullyQualifiedDomainName
member.summary: Gets the fully qualified domain name (FQDN) output reference from the bicep template for the Azure SQL Server resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.HostName
member.summary: Gets the host name for the SQL Server.
member.remarks: In container mode, resolves to the container's primary endpoint host. In Azure mode, resolves to the Azure SQL Server's fully qualified domain name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.Port
member.summary: Gets the port for the PostgreSQL server.
member.remarks: In container mode, resolves to the container's primary endpoint port. In Azure mode, resolves to 1433.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the SQL Server.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection template for the manifest for the Azure SQL Server resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.InnerResource
member.summary:
Gets the inner SqlServerServerResource resource.
This is set when RunAsContainer is called on the AzureSqlServerResource resource to create a local SQL Server container.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.IsContainer
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current resource represents a container. If so the actual resource is not running in Azure.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.AzureSqlDatabases
member.summary: A dictionary where the key is the resource name and the value is the Azure SQL database resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.Databases
member.summary: A dictionary where the key is the resource name and the value is the Azure SQL database name.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource.JdbcConnectionString
member.summary: Gets the JDBC connection string for the server.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure SQL resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions.PublishAsAzureSqlDatabase(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.SqlServerServerResource})
member.summary: Configures SQL Server resource to be deployed as Azure SQL Database (server).
member.param: The builder for the SQL Server resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions.AsAzureSqlDatabase(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.SqlServerServerResource})
member.summary: Configures SQL Server resource to be deployed as Azure SQL Database (server).
member.param: The builder for the SQL Server resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions.AddAzureSqlServer(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure SQL Database (server) resource to the application model.
member.param: The builder for the distributed application.
The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions.AddDatabase(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure SQL Database to the application model. The Free Offer option will be used when deploying the resource in Azure
member.param: The builder for the Azure SQL resource.
The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.
The name of the database. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions.WithDefaultAzureSku(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource})
member.summary: Configures the Azure SQL Database to be deployed use the default SKU provided by Azure. Please be aware that the Azure default Sku might not take advantage of the free offer.
member.param: The builder for the Azure SQL resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureSqlExtensions.RunAsContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.SqlServerServerResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure SQL Database (server) resource to run locally in a container.
member.param: The builder for the Azure SQL resource.
Callback that exposes underlying container to allow for customization.
